rule: attributes are sorted by (namespace URI, local name) and empty elements are expanded to a start/end tag pair
provenance: derived from W3C Canonical XML 1.0 REC (xml-c14n-20010315) §2.3 (empty elements) and §2.4 (document order / attribute sorting) rules; expected output computed by hand from the spec rules, not from a third-party tool. See v19 for a verbatim-REC attribute/namespace ordering example.
